title: Paps Fantasy Origins
description: A collection of Fantasy inspired Origins races.
body:
FABRIC MOD
REQUIRES ORIGINS AND PEHKUI

 

Feel free to use in any modpacks!

 

Origins:

Human
Dwarf
Elf
Halfling
Orc
Goblin
Giant
Nych 
Psari
Vipera
 

Human

No powers - vanilla experience
 

Dwarf

+ Various Stone types mining speed increased
+ Natural armour while at 30y or below
+ 1.5x damage with Pickaxes
- Can't Swim
- Slowness in water
- Takes extra fall damage
 

Elf

+ Granted speed while holding a bow
+ Granted speed and jump boost while standing on leaves
+ Strength while mounted
- Takes double wither damage
 

Halfling

+ One block tall crouched
+ Better trades with villagers
+ Active ability to turn invisible
- Negative knockback resistance
- Loses 3 hearts of health
 

Orc

+ Active ability to give Strength 3 for 10 seconds with long cooldown
+ Extra 4 hearts
+ Knockback Resistance
- Is 3 blocks tall
 

Goblin

+ One block tall crouched
+ Immune to Hunger effect
+ Immune to poison
+ Yields experience from mining gold
- Loses 1 heart of health
- Slow swim speed
- Negative knockback resistance
 

Giant

+ Extra 4 hearts
+ Ability to smash the ground, damaging those nearby
+ Ability to Pick up and Put down a variety of passive mobs and other players
+ Knockback Resistance
+ Can reach blocks a little further away
- Needs to eat more to satisfy hunger
- Is 3 blocks tall and 2 wide
- Cannot swim and instead sinks to the bottom
 

Nych

+ Has permanent Elytra
+ Active ability to leap in the air, or used in flight HUGE boost
+ Nightvision
- Suffers from blindness in sunlight
- Loses 3 hearts of health
 

Psari

+ Can breath underwater
+ Can mine at normal speed underwater
+ Can move and swim faster underwater
+ 1.2x Trident Damage
+ When hit blinds the attacker with ink (on a cooldown)
- Cannot naturally regenerate health out of water
- Takes double fire damage
 

Vipera

+ Deals poison damage when attacking
+ Is immune to poison
+ Can phase through sand and gravel while crouching
+ Strength in hot temperatures
- Weakness in cold temperatures
- Takes triple freeze damage
